REIS IA MOODBOARD DESIGN SYSTEM v1.0

Moodboard

The visual direction for Reis IA — a dark, minimal, premium aesthetic inspired by Apple, Porsche, Linear, and Stripe. No HUD elements. No cyberpunk. Pure architectural precision.

[01] Aesthetic Pillars

Dark Canvas Mastery

Pure black as the foundation. Depth through surface layering, not shadows. The dark canvas creates tension and focus that commands attention.

Aa

Typographic Authority

Inter Variable at large sizes with tight tracking. The type system does the hierarchy work — confident headlines against generous body text.

Singular Accent

One accent color — #4A90FF blue. It is reserved for conversion moments and emphasis. If it is blue, it should be actionable.

Geometric Precision

Grid-based layout. Mathematical spacing. Every value is intentional — engineered like the AI systems we build.

Layered Depth

Five surface tiers create physical depth perception without shadows. Elevation comes from background lightness, not shadow darkness.

Premium Breathing Room

Apple-level section padding (64-160px). Generous spacing signals premium positioning. Every element earns its space.

[02] Design References

The Reis IA design system is a unique synthesis of techniques from 8 premium brands. Each reference contributes specific patterns — none are copied wholesale.

Apple

Generous section padding (100-200px), 60%+ viewport breathing room, display headline sizes.

Porsche

Fluid clamp() typography, custom easing curves, 3-weight/1-shadow discipline.

Linear

Opacity-based text hierarchy, text-wrap: balance/pretty, 800ms entrance animations.

Stripe

Optical vertical padding on buttons, card-specific easing, letter-spacing-tightens-as-size-increases.

Vercel

Pure black canvas, 3-tier elevation model, ease-out (0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for reveals.

AIOX

Hairline grid technique, section numbered labels, page header bar pattern, mega-menu navigation.

Morningside AI

Blue glow shadow (0 0 50px), background-clip gradient border technique.

Agencia Lendaria

Ambient light pools at section corners, alternating corner positions for depth.

[03] What We Are Not

Knowing what Reis IA is not is as important as knowing what it is. The brand avoids these common traps in the AI/tech space:

HUD/cyberpunk/cockpit visual language
Neon green, lime, or bright accent colors
Gradient text effects or rainbow accents
SaaS pricing tables, tier comparison cards
Bouncy, elastic, or spring animations
Decorative illustrations or cartoon mascots
Busy dashboards as hero visuals
Multiple accent colors competing for attention
Light mode or theme toggles
Gold, amber, or warm accent tones
[04] Mood in Practice

This page itself demonstrates the Reis IA mood: dark canvas, singular blue accent, generous spacing, Inter typography at multiple weights, and surface layering for depth. The design system documents itself.

The Reis IA Aesthetic

Precision. Depth. Restraint.

A premium dark aesthetic where every element earns its space, blue signals action, and the surface system creates tangible depth.

REIS IA

Design System v1.0 — the single source of truth for the Reis IA brand identity, tokens, components, and patterns.
